  • Home

  • HDD - 3.5" Drives

3.5" Hard Drives

Optimise your storage with high-performance 3.5” hard drives
Craving more storage space for your ever-expanding digital world? Look no further than Scorptec's powerhouse selection of high-performance 3.5" hard drives! Whether you're a gamer stockpiling AAA titles, a creative professional working with massive files, or a business needing a reliable storage backbone, we have the perfect 3.5” hard drives for sale. Explore our extensive product range, from industry-leading capacities to blazing-fast data transfer speeds, for a faster setup.


High-capacity storage solutions
We have the most reliable 3.5" hard drives that offer high-capacity storage, ideal for users who need to store large amounts of data. Brands like Seagate and Western Digital provide options with capacities ranging from 1TB to 18TB. Get ample space for all your files, applications and backups. HDD 3.5” features include fast data transfer rates, with many drives offering speeds of up to 7200 RPM and caches up to 256MB that enhance performance for data-intensive tasks. Additionally, HDD 3.5” models like the Seagate IronWolf come with vibration resistance and optimised firmware for NAS systems for better reliability and longevity.


External and internal 3.5" hard drives
3.5” external hard drives offer portability and ease of use, ideal for transferring large files and adding storage without installation, with interfaces like USB 3.0 or Thunderbolt for fast data transfers. Meanwhile, 3.5” internal hard drives provide permanent storage solutions and better integration with your system. They are suitable for extensive tasks like gaming, video editing and data archiving.
 

Specialised drives for different needs
For those with specialised needs, we offer HDD 3.5” that fit various applications. Try the Western Digital Purple series for surveillance systems. These features enhanced write endurance, reliability and the ability to handle up to 64 HD cameras simultaneously. Plus, the WD HDD 3.5” offers AllFrame AI technology for improved performance in AI-enabled systems. Meanwhile, the Seagate BarraCuda series is perfect for everyday computing. These fast 3.5" hard drives provide a balance of performance and cost-efficiency with features like Multi-Tier Caching Technology™ for faster load times and reliable storage up to 8TB.


Buy 3.5” hard drives at Scorptec
Level up your storage game with Scorptec's powerhouse selection of 3.5" hard drives! Whether you're a data-hoarding gamer or creative wrestling with massive files, we have the best HDDs at 3.5”. External drives offer portable power for easy transfers, while internal drives provide seamless integration and raw muscle for your PC. Explore your options at our physical and online stores. Want to learn about 3.5” hard drive prices and get expert advice? Call us today!


FAQs
What factors should I consider when choosing a 3.5-” hard drive?
Here are some key factors to consider:

●    Capacity: How much storage space do you need? External drives typically range from 500GB to several TB, while internal drives offer even larger capacities for extensive data storage.
●    Speed: Measured in RPM (rotations per minute), speed affects data transfer rates. Generally, higher RPM means faster speeds. Interface type (USB 3.0 vs. Thunderbolt) also influences the speed for external drives.
●    Purpose: Consider how you'll use the drive. External drives are ideal for portability and backups, while internal drives are better for everyday use and demanding tasks. NAS-optimised drives are perfect for network storage needs.


How long do HDDs 3.5” typically last?
The lifespan of a 3.5” hard drive depends on various factors like usage, quality and operating environment. Generally, they can last anywhere from 3 to 7 years, with some lasting even longer.
